name: N26 Developer (TransactionAPI)
description: N26 open-banking + business API for statements and accounting sync.

seo.title: N26 Developer (TransactionAPI) — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: N26 Developer (TransactionAPI): N26 open-banking + business API for statements and accounting sync.

when_to_use: Syncing N26 transaction data to accounting software
Fetching bank statements for open-banking expense apps
Reconciling business account movements via API
Building cash-flow dashboards from N26 data

pros: Programmatic access to N26 account data
cons: Feature set narrower than dedicated open-banking APIs
API access gated by account type
review.verdict: Account-data API for N26 customers — useful for accounting sync, irrelevant as payment gateway.
review.best_for: N26 business customers automating accounting and transaction sync
review.not_for: Merchants needing payment acceptance or non-N26 users
